creator: f.degner@mail.de
text:
This is because a bmake feature is used in www/zenphoto's Makefile:

% uname -r
9.3-STABLE
% make describe -C/usr/ports/www/zenphoto >/dev/null
Unknown modifier '['

% bmake describe -C/usr/ports/www/zenphoto >/dev/null
% grep -A2 :O: /usr/ports/www/zenphoto/Makefile
.for dir in ${MS_DIRRMTRY:O:[-1..1]}
        ${ECHO_CMD} '@dir %%WWWDIR%%/${dir}' >> ${MS_PLIST}
.endfor
%
